nasb.text: The Lord has accomplished His wrath, He has poured out His fierce anger; And He has kindled a fire in Zion Which has consumed its foundations.

esv.text: The Lord gave full vent to his wrath; he poured out his hot anger, and he kindled a fire in Zion that consumed its foundations.

cnv.text: 耶和華大發震怒，傾倒他的烈怒； 他在錫安放火，吞滅了錫安的根基。

ccb.text: 耶和华大发烈怒， 倾倒祂的怒气， 在锡安燃起大火， 焚毁城的根基。
